name: definitelynotwordle
description: A fullstack app meant to look like the popular NYT game Wordle :D

scripts.dev: concurrently --names "frontend,backend" --prefix-colors "cyan,yellow" "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "npm run dev --prefix backend"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix backend
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix backend
